rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: surees ivattu beligge niinu snana maadlilvaa ?
rows.english: Suresh, did you not bathe this morning ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: No, I didn't.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Why ? Are you not feeling well ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: illa, eenoo tumbaa sustu, adakke madlilla.
rows.english: No, I am very much exhausted. So I did not bathe.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you not take your meal even ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: No, I did not take my meal even.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: If so, did you not eat anything ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: No. (nothing)

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: How do you feel now ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: It is the same, I have fever too.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Too bad ! didn't you go to the doctor ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: illa, hooglilla, taavu dayavittu daaktrannu karitiiraa ?
rows.english: No, I didn't go, will you kindly call the doctor ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Yes, I will call him just now.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What happened to your dog ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: The bus ran over its leg.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Where ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Here, on the road in front of our house.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: How did it happen ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: naayi madhya rasteeli oodtu, aaga bassu bantu.
rows.english: The dog ran in the middle of the road and the bus came just then.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Was it hurt much ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, one leg is broken.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Poor thing !

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: ivattu beligge niivu klaasge yaake barlilla ?
rows.english: Why did you not come to the class this morning ?
